text: This is the record of Adam's family line; God made mankind in his own likeness.
He made them male and female, blessed them, and called them 'mankind' when they were created.
Adam lived 130 years and fathered a son in his likeness, named Seth.
After Seth, Adam lived 800 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Adam lived 930 years in all, and then he died.
Seth lived 105 years and fathered Enosh.
After Enosh, Seth lived 807 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Seth lived 912 years in all, and then he died.
Enosh lived 90 years and fathered Kenan.
After Kenan, Enosh lived 815 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Enosh lived 905 years in all, and then he died.
Kenan lived 70 years and fathered Mahalalel.
After Mahalalel, Kenan lived 840 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Kenan lived 910 years in all, and then he died.
Mahalalel lived 65 years and fathered Jared.
After Jared, Mahalalel lived 830 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Mahalalel lived 895 years in all, and then he died.
Jared lived 162 years and fathered Enoch.
After Enoch, Jared lived 800 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Jared lived 962 years in all, and then he died.
Enoch lived 65 years and fathered Methuselah.
After Methuselah, Enoch walked faithfully with God for 300 more years, with other sons and daughters.
Enoch lived 365 years in all.
Enoch walked faithfully with God, and then he was gone, because God took him.
Methuselah lived 187 years and fathered Lamech.
After Lamech, Methuselah lived 782 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Methuselah lived 969 years in all, and then he died.
Lamech lived 182 years and fathered a son.
He named him Noah, saying he would bring relief from the painful labor of working the cursed ground.
After Noah, Lamech lived 595 more years and had other sons and daughters.
Lamech lived 777 years in all, and then he died.
By age 500 Noah had fathered Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
